component.name: Claude Desktop
component.summary: Unofficial desktop client for Claude AI

description.p: Claude Desktop is an unofficial, lightweight desktop wrapper for Claude AI (claude.ai). It provides a clean, distraction-free native window experience for interacting with Claude — without needing to keep a browser tab open.

ul.li: Loads the full Claude AI interface (claude.ai) in a native window
Supports Google Sign-In — opens in your system browser for security
Right-click context menu with image-saving support
Single-instance enforcement — re-focuses existing window on relaunch
Wayland and X11 support (auto-detected on Fedora/GNOME)

description.p: Note: This application requires an internet connection and a Claude AI account at claude.ai. No API key is required for the free tier.

screenshot.caption: Claude AI chat interface in the desktop window

ul.li: Full Claude AI interface in a native desktop window
Wayland and X11 support for Fedora and other Linux distributions
Google Sign-In redirected to system browser
